title: Lesson Tracker Foundation: Schema, Models e Catálogo de Aulas RegLife
plan: Add lessons and hand_lessons tables to src/db/schema.py with proper columns and indices
Create src/db/seed_lessons.py with 25 RegLife lessons cataloged by category and subcategory (referencing PDFs in classes/ directory)
Add lesson repository methods to src/db/repository.py (or new src/db/lesson_repository.py): insert_lesson, get_lessons, link_hand_to_lesson, get_lesson_hand_count, seed_lessons_if_empty
Create tests/test_lesson_repository.py with tests for all repository methods including seed auto-insert
Add 'lessons' CLI command to main.py that lists all lessons with linked hand counts
Wire seed_lessons into init_db or first-run path so lessons are auto-populated
Run quality gates: tests, lint, typecheck
